ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "handle" TEXT /* Social media handle of the user */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "posts" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each post */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the post */,
  "status_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the post on the social media platform */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the post was made */,
  "text" TEXT /* Text content of the post */,
  "is_quote" INTEGER /* Whether the post is a quote */,
  "is_retweet" INTEGER /* Whether the post is a retweet */,
  "post_type" TEXT /* Type of post (e.g., tweet, retweet, quote) */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the post */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the post (e.g., Twitter Web Client, Twitter for iPhone) */,
  "hashtags" TEXT /* Hashtags used in the post */,
  "urls" TEXT /* URLs mentioned in the post */,
  "media" TEXT /* Media attached to the post (e.g., images, videos) */,
  "poll" TEXT /* Poll data attached to the post */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hashtags" (
  "hashtag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hashtag */,
  "hashtag_name" TEXT /* Name of the hashtag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hashtag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "post_hashtags" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post */,
  "hashtag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hashtag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the hashtag was added to the post */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id", "hashtag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mentions" (
  "mention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mention */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user mentioned */,
  "mention_text" TEXT /* Text of the mention (e.g., '@username') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mentions_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mentions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "replies" (
  "reply_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reply */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post being replied to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the reply */,
  "reply_to_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being replied to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the reply was made */,
  "text" TEXT /* Text content of the reply */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reply_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_replies_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_replies_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_replies_reply_to_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("reply_to_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "likes" (
  "like_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each like */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post being liked */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user liking the post */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the like was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("like_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_likes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_likes_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "retweets" (
  "retweet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each retweet */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post being retweeted */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user retweeting the post */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the retweet was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("retweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_retweets_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_retweets_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quotes" (
  "quote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quote */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post being quoted */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user quoting the post */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the quote was made */,
  "text" TEXT /* Text content of the quote */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quotes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quotes_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentiments" (
  "sentiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentiment analysis */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post being analyzed */,
  "sentiment" TEXT /* Sentiment of the post (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Sentiment score (e.g., 0.8 for 80% positive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the sentiment analysis was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sentiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sentiments_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic model */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post being modeled */,
  "topic" TEXT /* Topic of the post (e.g., politics, sports, entertainment) */,
  "topic_score" REAL /* Topic score (e.g., 0.7 for 70% relevance) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the topic model was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_topics_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user was assigned the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_teams" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user joined the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., sentiment analysis, topic modeling) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the report was generated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
